cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.description: Grants Courage to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: Full Moon
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Haste to all Nazgul for 1 turn.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.description: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.description: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.description: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.

cards.name: Struck by a Morgul Blade
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Dragon-fire
cards.description: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Burning (1 turn); enemies on forest tiles also gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.description: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.description: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent or Commander skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander in your hex if present.

cards.name: AshesOfGorgoroth
cards.description: Create a corruption pulse in radius 1-3 based on caster Mage: enemies gain Despair (1 turn), and allied evil characters remove Fear.

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: DreadOfTheNoldor
cards.description: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all Elf characters in radius 2, and apply Fear (1 turn) to enemy elves in the caster's hex.

cards.name: FiresOfDoom
cards.description: Environmental event: apply Burning (1 turn) to all enemy units on wastelands tiles.

cards.name: Rain
cards.description: Environmental event: remove Burning from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.description: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.description: In radius 2, apply Burning (1 turn) and Fear (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: The Blow of Gorgoroth
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: War spoils
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Mounts
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Luglurak Dark Magic
cards.description: Enemy characters in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: Marked by a Nazgul
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.description: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.description: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.description: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.description: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.description: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.description: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.description: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and if the target has Fear remove it.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.description: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: TheIronCrownRidesAgain
cards.description: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.description: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: Traps
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Well-equiped Army
cards.description: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: WhenThereIsAWhip
cards.description: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste (3 turns).

cards.name: Morgul Tithe
cards.description: Morgul Tithe. Unique event logic variant based on ReachOfBaradUngol.

cards.name: Black Gate Sortie
cards.description: Black Gate Sortie. Unique event logic variant based on RaidFromTheMountains.

cards.name: Shroud of Gorgoroth
cards.description: Shroud of Gorgoroth. Unique event logic variant based on DoorsOfNight.

cards.name: Release Character
cards.description: Release one captive currently held by this character in the same hex.

cards.name: Ask Ransom
cards.description: Demand ransom for a captive in the same hex. If the captive's owner pays, the captive is released.

cards.name: Free Character
cards.description: Attempt to free an allied captive of the same nation in the same hex. Enemy agents hold captives more securely, and critical failure is dangerous.
